description: Crawler credential reference. Keep real key values out of source control. This file describes which environment variables the crawler should read.

crawler.path_resolution: Crawler defaults resolve relative to this folder, so moving the whole folder keeps references valid.
crawler.role: pre-crawler API/provider/key reference only; not a bulk data downloader or renderer

credentials.notes: NOAA CDO v2 uses the token HTTP header. Leave value empty here; set the real key in .env or your shell.
